text_original: it's nice but please increase free time limit
text_zh: 挺好的，但请增加免费时长限制。
reply_original: Hi! We are thrilled you're enjoying Fantasia! Regarding the chat limit, maintaining high-quality AI involves significant server costs, so ad revenue alone can't cover unlimited free messages yet. However, we are exploring new ways for users to earn more free chats! If you have more ideas, email us at support@fantachat.ai. Have fun!
reply_zh: 嗨！我们很高兴您喜欢 Fantasia！关于聊天限制，维持高质量的 AI 需要高昂的服务器成本，因此仅靠广告收入目前还无法支持无限量的免费消息。不过，我们正在探索让用户赚取更多免费聊天次数的新方法！如果您有更多想法，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。祝您玩得开心！
